vault_fragments.title: Active   in strategy -Params
vault_fragments.content:
UPDATE strategy_params 
SET active = 0 
WHERE broker_product_id IN (5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10);
This will deactivate:

SPY (product 5) - strategies 9, 10
QQQ (product 6) - strategies 11, 12
NVDA (product 7) - strategies 13, 14
AAPL (product 8) - strategies 15, 16
TSLA (product 9) - strategies 17, 18
MSFT (product 10) - strategies 19, 20


select id,  broker_product_id ,  direction   ,active  from  strategy_params;

vault_fragments.title: Strategy_params with broker/symbol and others
vault_fragments.content:
SELECT 
    sp.id, 
    b.name AS broker,
    bp.local_ticker AS symbol,
    sp.direction,
    sp.candle_time,
    sp.rsi_real_max,
    sp.rsi_real_min,
    sp.pl_amount
FROM strategy_params sp
JOIN broker_products bp ON sp.broker_product_id = bp.id
JOIN brokers b ON bp.broker_id = b.id
ORDER BY sp.id;
